name: Handsome Manufacturing
message: www.handsomegroup.com https://www.zoominfo.com/c/handsome-manufacturing-company-ltd/348223586 HANDSOME was established in 1968 in Hong Kong, with expertise in manufacturing OEM plastic items like toys and gifts. Handsome Industrial Company, Limited is a veteran OEM manufacturer that operates as a critical production partner for global entertainment giants like Disney and Marvel, specialized in bringing iconic characters to life through high-quality toys, electronics, and consumer goods. With production facilities in China and Indonesia
